queries.name: surrogates_list_by_stage
queries.critical_reason: Primary case-management list and required index invariant
queries.query: SELECT s.id, s.stage_id, s.status_label, s.owner_type, s.owner_id, s.created_at FROM surrogates AS s WHERE s.organization_id = $1 AND s.stage_id = $2 AND s.is_archived = FALSE ORDER BY s.created_at DESC LIMIT $3 OFFSET $4

queries.name: surrogate_detail
queries.query: SELECT s.id, s.stage_id, s.status_label, s.owner_type, s.owner_id, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM surrogates AS s WHERE s.organization_id = $1 AND s.id = $2 AND s.is_archived = FALSE

queries.name: tasks_open_by_owner
queries.query: SELECT t.id, t.surrogate_id, t.intended_parent_id, t.task_type, t.due_date, t.status FROM tasks AS t WHERE t.organization_id = $1 AND t.owner_type = $2 AND t.owner_id = $3 AND t.is_completed = FALSE ORDER BY t.due_date NULLS LAST, t.created_at DESC LIMIT $4 OFFSET $5

queries.name: dashboard_surrogate_counts
queries.query: SELECT s.stage_id, count(*) FROM surrogates AS s WHERE s.organization_id = $1 AND s.is_archived = FALSE GROUP BY s.stage_id

queries.name: dashboard_upcoming_tasks
queries.query: SELECT t.id, t.surrogate_id, t.intended_parent_id, t.due_date, t.status FROM tasks AS t WHERE t.organization_id = $1 AND t.is_completed = FALSE AND t.due_date <= $2 ORDER BY t.due_date NULLS LAST LIMIT $3

queries.name: analytics_surrogates_by_stage
queries.query: SELECT ps.stage_type, count(*) FROM pipeline_stages AS ps LEFT JOIN surrogates AS s ON s.stage_id = ps.id AND s.organization_id = $1 AND s.is_archived = FALSE WHERE ps.pipeline_id = $2 AND ps.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY ps.stage_type, ps.order ORDER BY ps.order

queries.name: workflow_list
queries.query: SELECT w.id, w.trigger_type, w.is_enabled, w.scope, w.run_count, w.last_run_at FROM automation_workflows AS w WHERE w.organization_id = $1 AND (w.scope = $2 OR w.owner_user_id = $3) ORDER BY w.updated_at DESC

queries.name: workflow_stats
queries.query: SELECT e.status, count(*), avg(e.duration_ms) FROM workflow_executions AS e WHERE e.organization_id = $1 AND e.executed_at >= $2 GROUP BY e.status

queries.name: intelligent_suggestions_rules
queries.query: SELECT r.rule_kind, r.stage_slug, r.business_days, r.sort_order FROM org_intelligent_suggestion_rules AS r WHERE r.organization_id = $1 AND r.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY r.sort_order

queries.name: surrogate_search
queries.query: SELECT s.id, s.stage_id, s.status_label FROM surrogates AS s WHERE s.organization_id = $1 AND s.is_archived = FALSE AND s.search_vector @@ websearch_to_tsquery('simple', $2) ORDER BY ts_rank(s.search_vector, websearch_to_tsquery('simple', $2)) DESC LIMIT $3

queries.name: complete_task_mutation
queries.query: UPDATE tasks SET is_completed = TRUE, completed_at = $3, updated_at = $3 WHERE organization_id = $1 AND id = $2 RETURNING id

queries.name: pipeline_stage_dimension
queries.critical_reason: Acceptance case where a small-table sequential scan is legitimate
queries.query: SELECT ps.id, ps.stage_key, ps.stage_type, ps.order FROM pipeline_stages AS ps WHERE ps.pipeline_id = $1 AND ps.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY ps.order
